keyFeatures.en: Convert, edit, and compress PDF files
Generate PDFs from various document types
Secure file sharing and download options
keyFeatures.zh: 安全的文件共享和下载选项

description.en: Basic features such as PDF conversion, editing, and compression. No file size limit for PDFs up to 50MB.
description.zh: 基本功能如PDF转换、编辑和压缩。PDF文件大小上限为50MB，无文件大小限制。

description.en: All features of the Free plan plus advanced editing tools, unlimited file size for PDFs, and secure file sharing options.
description.zh: 免费计划的所有功能，加上高级编辑工具，不限PDF文件大小，以及安全的文件共享选项。

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses needing basic PDF editing and conversion tools
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本PDF编辑和转换工具的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Smallpdf positions itself as a user-friendly and versatile tool for handling PDF files, suitable for both personal and professional use.
positioning.zh: Smallpdf将自己定位为一个易于使用且功能多样的PDF处理工具，适用于个人和专业用途。
